headlines.description: — Matt Nagy still has a job and perhaps his team has a shot to salvage its season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Santos' game-ending FG ends Bears' skid versus winless Lions

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Dallas Cowboys

headlines.description: — Derek Carr and the Las Vegas Raiders got the third-down help they needed from Dallas cornerback Anthony Brown.
headlines.shortLinkText: Raiders beat Cowboys 36-33 in OT on field goal after penalty

events.name: Buffalo Bills at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Josh Allen and the mercurial Buffalo Bills swung back to a better version of themselves against the reeling New Orleans Saints.
headlines.shortLinkText: Allen throws for 4 TDs as Bills beat hobbled Saints, 31-6
